scripts.bundle: ([ -f .env.local ] && set -a && . ./.env.local && set +a) || true; OUTFILE="${CLI_BUNDLE_OUTFILE:-./dist/doughnut-cli.bundle.mjs}"; pnpm exec esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile="$OUTFILE" --format=esm --alias:doughnut-api=../packages/doughnut-api/src/index.ts --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --define:CLI_VERSION=\"${CLI_VERSION:-0.1.0}\" --define:process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=\"${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:-}\" --define:process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=\"${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:-}\"
